text:
Revenge × And × Recovery (フクシュウ×ト×シュウフク, Fukushū × To × Shūfuku) is the 116 th episode of the Hunter × Hunter 2011 series. It first aired on February 12 th , 2014.

Overview

Gon and Killua finally come face-to-face with Neferpitou. However, things get complicated when Neferpitou begs Gon to wait in order to heal and save Komugi. Despite his overwhelming anger and frustration, Gon allows Komugi to be healed and agrees to wait for an hour before their fight begins.

Summary

Gon and Killua find Neferpitou inside the room as Doctor Blythe heals an injured Komugi. Neferpitou turns behind to see Gon's aura intensifying and darkening. Gon introduces himself, but Neferpitou doesn't listen; its attention is focused on its task at hand. Killua notices its uncanny and passive reaction and analyzes the situation. He perceives that Neferpitou is actually healing Komugi and is protecting her. Killua remembers what his grandfather had told them earlier.

However, Gon's sees Neferpitou as enemy and demands to have a battle with him. Neferpitou then bows her head and places her palms face-up which stops Gon in his tracks. It then asks him to wait which enrages Gon even more and his aura becomes stronger. Killua comes to a conclusion that Komugi was injured because of the previous attack of Zeno's Dragon Dive Nen ability.

Neferpitou asks again for Gon to wait and promises to do anything he will say. But Gon remains unconvinced, his anger getting the best of him again, and Neferpitou admits that Komugi is someone special to the King. She promises to do whatever Gon will want after Komugi is healed. Gon loses his temper again and yells at Neferpitou. Killua intervenes and tries to convince Gon that Komugi was probably injured by the invasion. As Gon scolds Killua that he cannot trust that creature, Neferpitou suddenly breaks her left arm as a reminder of her promise. Gon is angered and confused by Pitou's sudden determination to save a human life, which contradicts her savagery against Kite. In his rage, Gon smashes the floor and begins to cry. He releases another surge of aura. He prepares Jajanken, to which Killua reminds him of their real objective to get back Kite. Gon then unintentionally insults Killua by stating that it's easy for to remain calm like that since he has no concern in this fight.

Fortunately, Gon calms down and asks Neferpitou how long she will take for the healing to be done. Neferpitou replies that a full-healing would take three to four hours which Gon refuses to wait for. Then, Neferpitou asks for just an hour so that she could heal the most critical injuries. Gon tells Neferpitou to come to Peijin with him after an hour to heal Kite. He sits down in front of the Royal Guard and is determined to wait there for an hour. Meanwhile, Killua appears to have left.
